title: [CalyxToHW] Fix missing i1-to-clock conversion in convertPipelineOp
body:
Fixes #9714 

`convertPipelineOp` passes the `i1` clock wire from `wireIn` directly to `reg()`/`regCe()`, which create `seq::CompRegOp`/`seq::CompRegClockEnabledOp`. These ops require `seq::ClockType`, not `i1`.

The `RegisterOp` case was fixed in #6139, but `convertPipelineOp` was missed. This adds the same `seq::ToClockOp` conversion.
